keyFacts: Reindeer appear during Christmas season and give cookies when clicked.
Base reward is one minute of production or 25 cookies, whichever is higher.
Ho ho ho-flavored frosting doubles reindeer rewards; reindeer rewards are not capped by cookies in bank.
__summary.reward: You will get a minute worth of cookie production initially or 25 cookies, whichever is highest (if you have Wrinklers the unwithered production rate will be used for calculation). With the "Ho ho ho-flavored frosting" upgrade, you will receive twice as many cookies (two minutes worth of production). The amount dropped is furthermore affected by Golden Cookie effects like Frenzy, Clot, Dragon Harvest, Elder Frenzy, or Cursed Finger. Note that Deer rewards are, in contrast to Golden Cookie rewards, not limited by your current cookies in the bank. Frenzies will multiply the gain by 0.75 and Elder Frenzies by 0.5. Popping a Reindeer during Frenzy + Elder Frenzy yields massive amount of cookies. Popping a Reindeer during Frenzy + Elder Frenzy yields massive amount of cookies. A deer during a Frenzy giving cookies equal to 10 minutes and 30 seconds of regular production (two minutes * (7 * 0.75)) A deer during an Elder Frenzy, also known as Eldeer (itself an Achievement), is one of the highest rewarding effect combos in the game, giving cookies equal to 12 hours and 6 minutes of regular production (two minutes * (666*0.5)). Therefore, it's often advised to "synchronize" Golden Cookies and Reindeer during Christmas season, meaning to not click the gc (or wc) until a Reindeer appears or might appear before a potential Elder Frenzy would end. Since the 2.002 update, it is now possible for Elder Frenzies to overlap with Frenzies or Dragon Harvests (or even Building Specials, if the DEoRL heavenly upgrade lets a Golden/Wrath Cookie with each spawn at once), making it possible to ge...
__summary.spawn: The Reindeer follows Spawning mechanism, and can be approximated by following functions: p ( t ) = { 0 T min > t p ( t - T min ) T max > t T min 0 t T max {\displaystyle {\bar {p}}(t)={\begin{cases}0&T_{\text{min}}>t\\p(t-T_{\text{min}})&T_{\text{max}}>t\geq T_{\text{min}}\\0&t\geq T_{\text{max}}\\\end{cases}}} P ( t ) = { 0 T min > t P ( t - T min ) T max > t T min 1 t T max {\displaystyle {\bar {P}}(t)={\begin{cases}0&T_{\text{min}}>t\\P(t-T_{\text{min}})&T_{\text{max}}>t\geq T_{\text{min}}\\1&t\geq T_{\text{max}}\\\end{cases}}} P - 1 ( c ) = { ( - T 5 5 ln ( 1 - c ) ) 1 6 + T min 1 - exp ( - 5 T ) c > 0 T max c > 1 - exp ( - 5 T ) {\displaystyle {\bar {P}}^{-1}(c)={\begin{cases}\left({\frac {-T^{5}}{5}}\ln(1-c)\right)^{\frac {1}{6}}+T_{\text{min}}&1-\exp(-5T)\geq c>0\\T_{\text{max}}&c>1-\exp(-5T)\\\end{cases}}} Where p, P and P-1 are probability density function, cumulative density function and inverse cumulative density function respectively. All time units are in seconds. For Reindeer, Tmin=180 seconds and Tmax=360 seconds initially. But there are many factors can alternate Tmin and Tmax. The time can be halved with the "Reindeer baking grounds" upgrade. The heavenly upgrade "Starsnow" also reduces the time by 5%. See the table below for some common probabilities, assuming 30 FPS: Time between Reindeer Spawns Chance Without upgrade With Starsnow With Reindeer baking grounds With both 0% 180 seconds 171 seconds 90 seconds 85.5 seconds 0.1% 198.3 seconds 188.5 seconds 100.3 seconds 95.3 seconds 1% 206.9 seconds 196.8 seconds 105.1 seconds 100.0 seconds 10% 219.8 secon...
__summary.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Reindeer pasted text

All time units are in seconds. For Reindeer, Tmin=180 seconds and Tmax=360 seconds initially. But there are many factors can alternate Tmin and Tmax. Christmas tree biscuits.Name: Christmas tree biscuits
Christmas tree biscuits.unlock condition: Minimum 20% drop chance from finding a reindeer during Christmas season
Christmas tree biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%. "Whose pine is it anyway?"
Christmas tree biscuits.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Reindeer pasted text

Snowflake biscuits.Name: Snowflake biscuits
Snowflake biscuits.unlock condition: Minimum 20% drop chance from finding a reindeer during Christmas season
Snowflake biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%. "Mass-produced to be unique in every way."
Snowflake biscuits.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Reindeer pasted text

Snowman biscuits.Name: Snowman biscuits
Snowman biscuits.unlock condition: Minimum 20% drop chance from finding a reindeer during Christmas season
Snowman biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%. "It's frosted. Doubly so."
Snowman biscuits.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Reindeer pasted text

Holly biscuits.Name: Holly biscuits
Holly biscuits.unlock condition: Minimum 20% drop chance from finding a reindeer during Christmas season
Holly biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%. "You don't smooch under these ones. That would be the mistletoe (which, botanically, is a smellier variant of the mistlefinger)."
Holly biscuits.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Reindeer pasted text

Candy cane biscuits.Name: Candy cane biscuits
Candy cane biscuits.unlock condition: Minimum 20% drop chance from finding a reindeer during Christmas season
Candy cane biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%. "It's two treats in one! (Further inspection reveals the frosting does not actually taste like peppermint, but like mundane sugary frosting.)"
Candy cane biscuits.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Reindeer pasted text

Bell biscuits.Name: Bell biscuits
Bell biscuits.unlock condition: Minimum 20% drop chance from finding a reindeer during Christmas season
Bell biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%. "What do these even have to do with christmas? Who cares, ring them in!"
Bell biscuits.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Reindeer pasted text

Present biscuits.Name: Present biscuits
Present biscuits.unlock condition: Minimum 20% drop chance from finding a reindeer during Christmas season
Present biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%. "The prequel to future biscuits. Watch out!"
Present biscuits.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Reindeer pasted text

Let it snow.Name: Let it snow
Let it snow.description: Unlock every Christmas-themed cookie. Owning this achievement makes Christmas-themed cookies drop more frequently in future playthroughs.
Let it snow.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Reindeer pasted text

Sleigh of hand.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Reindeer pasted text

Eldeer.Name: Eldeer
Eldeer.description: Pop a reindeer during an elder frenzy.
